heroHeading: Bring the mess. We'll make it move.
heroSubheading: Studio Ordo is a conversation-first workspace for teams working with AI. Search the library, map live workflows, generate charts and audio, and use QR-powered referrals to bring the right people in.

firstMessage.default: Bring me the messy workflow, bold idea, or half-finished handoff. I can help you map it, search the library, turn it into visuals, or explain the QR referral system.
firstMessage.withReferral: Welcome — {{referrer.name}} sent you here for a reason. I can show you what makes {{brand.name}} different, explain the QR referral system, or jump straight into the work.

referralSuggestions: How does the QR referral system work?
